title: Sample Field Note
summary: A sample Markdown post showing how GitLogBook can publish station notes, activations, projects, and field reports.
searchText:
sample field note a sample markdown post showing how gitlogbook can publish station notes, activations, projects, and field reports. this is a sample gitlogbook post. replace it with your own station notes, activation reports, project logs, or field stories.

posts live in `content/posts/` and are rebuilt into static pages with:

```sh
npm run posts
```

the public site shows recent posts in the about sidebar and provides a searchable post archive.
